Start Building

A smarter credit-building platform

Built to accelerate prospect growth, extend retention and unlock new revenue pipelines.

Enroll growth-ready prospects

Onboard new prospects into structured credit-building plans. No credit check required.

Monitor Payment Activity in Real Time

Track client payments as they occur. Each transaction links directly to their active plan, delivering full transparency into credit-building progress and performance.

Streamlined Bureau Submission

Verified installments are submitted directly to major credit bureaus as compliant tradelines — automated and streamlined for speed and accuracy.

Unlock Credit Growth

Accelerate client growth by improving credit visibility, increasing fundability, and paving the way for premium financial opportunities.

faq

Have questions

that need answers?

Can’t find the answer here? Please Reach out.

Which credit bureaus can I report to?

You can report to major consumer credit bureaus, including Experian, Equifax, and TransUnion, as well as business credit bureaus such as Experian Business and SBFE, depending on your chosen program.

What types of account can I report?

Do I need to become an approved data furnisher to use this platform?

Can I customize the products I offer?

How can this grow my business?

Do you offer training on using this programs?

How does this platform benefit my business and my clients?
